record_id.description: Unique identifier for the hot work permit record.

date.description: Date the hot work permit was issued.

permit_number.description: Unique permit number assigned to this hot work authorization.

work_location.description: Specific location within the facility where hot work will be performed.

work_description.description: Description of the hot work activity to be performed (e.g., welding, cutting, grinding).

fire_hazard_assessment.description: Pre-work gas-free verification and fire hazard evaluation.

flammable_gas_test.description: Name or type of gas detector instrument used for measurement.

gas_concentration_ppm.description: Measured flammable gas concentration in parts per million (ppm).

safe_to_proceed.description: Confirmation that gas concentration is below acceptable threshold and work may proceed.

authorized_by.description: Name or ID of the supervisor who authorized the hot work permit.

fire_watch_required.description: Indicates whether a fire watch attendant is required for this hot work.

fire_watch_name.description: Name or ID of the assigned fire watch attendant (required when fire_watch_required is true).

permit_expiry.description: Date and time at which the permit expires and work must stop unless renewed.

closure_signature.description: Signature or name of the person who closed the permit upon work completion.
